other: He gains Coin Power at 3+ and 5+ {status:Charge} Potency. He also gets speed and {status:SuperCoin} upgrades on his S2 and S3 at 3+ Potency.
He can consume 4 HP or shields instead of 2 {status:Charge} Count when triggering the passive from {ego:21204}.
Any {status:ChargeForceField} he gets is immediately upgraded to {status:HighVoltageExoshell} which basically does the same thing a the empowered clause of the former (for W corp ids).
usage: Provides {status:Charge} Count to allies deployed earlier than him with {keyword:Gloom} or {keyword:Envy} Res through his passive. If he's first deployed, he gains it himself instead. At 0-2 Potency and 12+ Count, he can also pass some of his Count to allies.

His S2 and S3 apply {status:PhotoElectricity} providing even more {status:Charge} Count to allies and his S3 applies {status:ChargedSting} to enemies increasing damage from {status:Charge} skills. Doubled if the skill is also {keyword:Envy}.

On death, he ignores it and gains {status:SelfChargeAlly} instead based on his {status:Charge} Potency. It's reduced by being attacked, by attacking, and at the end of every turn. He can't die until it runs out. He also gains +2 final power during this time.

1121501.desc:
Combat Start: Gain +5 [Charge] Count (once per Encounter)

Combat End: At more than 12 [Charge] Count, consume excess [Charge] Count up to 8 and apply +(half of [Charge] Count consumed due to this effect) [Charge] Count on an ally (min 1, rounded down)
- This effect prioritizes the ally with the lowest [Charge] Count among allies with earlier Deployment order than this unit
- If there are no allies with earlier Deployment order than this unit on the battlefield, or if this unit has 3+ [Charge], deactivate this effect

At 3+ Gloom or Envy Reson., apply +2 [Charge] Count next turn on allies with earlier Deployment order than this unit
- Applies on (Higher Reson. between Gloom and Envy - 2) allies, in Deployment order (max 3 allies)
- At 3+ [Charge], apply +4 [Charge] Count on allies instead
- If there are no allies with earlier Deployment order than this unit on the battlefield, gain +4 [Charge] Count instead
1121501.name: Take the Lead. I'll Provide You Support.

1121502.desc:
Gain 1 [Charge] every time this unit consumes 10 cumulative [Charge] Count in this Encounter
Any [ChargeForceField] this unit gains is converted to [HighVoltageExoshell]

At 3+ [Charge] on self, Min & Max Speed +1

In this Encounter, when this unit takes damage that brings its HP down to 0, gain [SelfChargeAlly] equal to (5 + [Charge] on self x 3) (max 20, once per Encounter)
1121502.name: Undying Persistence

1121503.desc:
Turn Start: If there are 3+ allies wearing E.G.O Gear including this unit, all relevant allies gain 1 [AttackUp]

If this unit has 12 or less [Charge] Count when consuming [Charge] Count due to AEDD Gregor's E.G.O Passive effect:
On Heads Hit, instead of consuming 2 [Charge] Count, this unit consumes 4 Shield or HP to activate the E.G.O Passive effect
- This effect triggers only when this unit is at 25%+ HP
1121503.name: Alternating Discharge Support

1121511.desc:
Combat Start: Gain +10 [Charge] Count (once per Encounter)

Combat End: At more than 12 [Charge] Count, consume excess [Charge] Count up to 8 and apply +(half of [Charge] Count consumed due to this effect) [Charge] Count on an ally (rounded up)
- This effect prioritizes the ally with the lowest [Charge] Count among allies with earlier Deployment order than this unit
- If there are no allies with earlier Deployment order than this unit on the battlefield, or if this unit has 3+ [Charge], deactivate this effect

At 2+ Gloom or Envy Reson., apply +2 [Charge] Count next turn on allies with earlier Deployment order than this unit
- Applies on (Higher Reson. between Gloom and Envy - 1) allies, in Deployment order (max 3 allies)
- At 3+ [Charge], apply +4 [Charge] Count on allies instead
- If there are no allies with earlier Deployment order than this unit on the battlefield, gain +4 [Charge] Count instead
1121511.name: Take the Lead. I'll Provide You Support.

1121521.desc: Turn End: 2 allies with the earliest Deployment order each heal HP equal to (the sum of [Charge] Count and 'Unique Charge' consumed by each of their own Attack Skills this turn, respectively) (max 10)
1121521.name: Defibrillation

1121531.desc: Turn End: 3 allies with the earliest Deployment order each heal HP equal to (the sum of [Charge] Count and 'Unique Charge' consumed by each of their own Attack Skills this turn, respectively) (max 10)
1121531.name: Defibrillation
